total_transition_budget_floor_dkk.rationale: Plan states DKK 15-25B reference range over 6 years. Base at midpoint; low/high mirror the stated reference floor/ceiling. Triangular within stated envelope (this is the committed envelope, not bottom-up CAPEX).

inflation_excess_over_baseline_pp.rationale: Premortem stress scenario quantifies +2pp shock (~DKK 2.2B real-value erosion); spread from zero (no excess) to 4pp matches eurozone post-2022 inflation excursions over multi-year horizons.

estimated_transition_cost_dkk.rationale: Megaproject CAPEX: bottom-up cost across legal, IT integration (TARGET2), cash logistics, comms. Right-skewed range per iron law of megaprojects; high reflects Risk 4 and Risk 9 schedule-driven overruns. Triangular pending lognormal sampler.

cash_logistics_shock_cost_dkk.rationale: Risk 5 / Premortem state DKK 100M overhead if dual circulation extends 1-3 months. Spread brackets the stated 100M with 2x downside coverage and 2x upside for compounded security/logistics failure.

transition_duration_years.rationale: Plan states 4-8 year window post political decision; budget reference uses 6 years as midpoint. Integer bounds reflect annual indexation review cycles.

baseline_inflation_rate.rationale: ECB inflation target 2%; eurozone CPI has ranged ~1-3.5% over comparable multi-year windows. Expert criticism cites 2027 CPI factor 1.015 as benchmark.

estimated_public_info_required_cost_dkk.rationale: Comparable EU adoption / referendum campaigns in mid-sized member states ran DKK-equivalent 60-250M for multi-year sustained messaging. Base aligned with the stated 0.5%-of-budget allocation magnitude (~DKK 100M at floor envelope).

correlations.rationale: Premortem and Issue 2 (Review Plan) jointly forecast that if eurozone inflation runs high, the excess-over-baseline shock co-moves with it — both reflect the same macroeconomic regime affecting budget real value.
